message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame fill arithmetic, extract_to_frame, and margins_name

- add_df_fill/sub_df_fill/mul_df_fill/div_df_fill: DataFrame binary ops
  with fill_value parameter for NaN handling during alignment
- Series.str.extract_to_frame: regex extraction returning DataFrame with
  one column per capture group, supporting named groups
- pivot_table_with_margins_name: customizable margin label (default "All")
- 5 new tests (856 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
